title: eriophyllum caespitosum var. integrifolium
intro: Eriophyllum caespitosum var. integrifolium, also known as Woolly Sun Cups or Woolly-leaved Woolly Sun Cups, is a rare variety of flowering plant in the sunflower family, characterized by its woolly leaves and stems. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Eriophyllum caespitosum var. integrifolium include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion for its medicinal purposes, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a treatment.
